title: ophrys × alibertiana
intro: Ophrys × alibertiana, also known as the Alibert's bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × alibertiana are said to include the ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
